name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_probe_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeProbeMap expands cruise skew-wake footprints into rotor-resolved local probe points.
note: Primary audit surface for local skew-wake probe targets.

name: l2_powered_cruise_wake_footprint
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseWakeFootprint supplies wake skew angle sweep distance contracted far-wake area and cell-space footprint context.
note: Cruise skew-wake footprint input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSourceMap supplies per-rotor centers thrust axes open areas pressure jumps and thrust targets.
note: Rotor source-term input.

name: l2_powered_source_request_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceRequestPlan supplies inlet direction and static L2 cell size for probe coordinates.
note: Request envelope input for inlet axis and cell metrics.

name: l2_actuator_disk_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskSourceMap supplies the RotorDiskSourceTerm geometry used by powered cruise rows.
note: Source geometry basis for rotor-resolved probes.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream CFD target for future local powered cruise skew-wake probes.
note: Upstream CFD target for future live probe validation.
